hero.subtitle: Salons, restaurants, hotels, coworking spaces, gyms and clinics — accept bookings 24/7 without calls or messengers.

categories.title: Popular categories
categories.subtitle: Find the right place near you

features.title: Everything you need to run your business
features.subtitle: No clutter — just what your business actually needs

instantBooking.title: Instant booking
instantBooking.desc: Clients pick a time and book in 30 seconds without calls or waiting.

anyDevice.title: Works on any device
anyDevice.desc: A responsive interface for phone, tablet and desktop.

onlinePayment.title: Online payments
onlinePayment.desc: Accept prepayment online. Funds arrive instantly.

emailNotifications.title: Email notifications
emailNotifications.desc: Clients receive confirmation immediately after booking.

analytics.title: Analytics and statistics
analytics.desc: Track occupancy, revenue and popular services in real time.

staffManagement.title: Staff management
staffManagement.desc: Add employees, assign roles, and manage schedules.

steps.title: Launch in a single day
steps.subtitle: No technical knowledge or developers required

registerBusiness.title: Register your business
registerBusiness.desc: Create an account and fill in your company profile in 5 minutes.

addResources.title: Add resources and schedule
addResources.desc: List your staff, tables or rooms and set working hours.

shareLink.title: Share your link
shareLink.desc: Send clients a link to your booking page.

acceptBookings.title: Accept bookings
acceptBookings.desc: Manage bookings from a convenient dashboard.

aigul.name: Aigul M.
aigul.text: I used to keep a notebook for appointments. Now everything is online — clients pick their own time and I see all bookings in one place.

daniyar.name: Daniyar K.
daniyar.text: We set it up in a single day. Online payment was a great touch — no more reminding clients to pay.

nurzhan.name: Nurzhan A.
nurzhan.text: The system adapts to how we work. Trainers can see their own schedule directly in the dashboard.

ctaSection.title: Get started for free right now
ctaSection.subtitle: Free plan forever. Upgrade when you need more features.

footer.tagline: An online booking platform for small and medium businesses.
